articles.headline: Rice hails England's 'frightening' attacking substitutes
articles.description: Declan Rice reacts to England's 3-0 win over Costa Rica in their final friendly ahead of the 2026 FIFA World Cup.

images.name: Rice hails England's 'frightening' attacking substitutes
images.caption: Declan Rice reacts to England's 3-0 win over Costa Rica in their final friendly ahead of the 2026 FIFA World Cup.

articles.headline: England sign off WC prep with 3-0 win as Rice, Gordon, Watkins score
articles.description: Returning Declan Rice set England on course for a morale-boosting 3-0 victory against Costa Rica after a heavy thunderstorm in Orlando delayed their final World Cup warmup match by an hour.

images.name: Declan Rice [1296x729]
images.caption: Declan Rice opened the scoring for England shortly after 10 minutes played.

images.name: Tuchel: England can't be World Cup favourites
images.caption: Thomas Tuchel says England can't be favourites because there are "proven winners" at the 2026 FIFA World Cup.

articles.headline: Burley questions if Portugal's Martinez would drop Ronaldo
articles.description: Craig Burley debates whether Roberto Martinez should drop Cristiano Ronaldo amid growing scrutiny over his place in Portugal's starting lineup.

images.name: Burley questions if Portugal's Martinez would drop Ronaldo
images.caption: Craig Burley debates whether Roberto Martinez should drop Cristiano Ronaldo amid growing scrutiny over his place in Portugal's starting lineup.

articles.headline: Argentina wins as Messi scores in cameo in front of 88k in Alabama
articles.description: Argentine legend Messi, who is working his way back from muscle fatigue ahead of the start of the FIFA World Cup, came on in the 70th minute and scored from the penalty spot right after in his team's 3-0 win over Iceland.

images.name: Messi celeb Arg Iceland_260609 [1296x729]
images.caption: Lionel Messi celebrates after scoring a goal for Argentina in a friendly against Iceland.
images.alt: Lionel Messi celebrates after scoring a goal for Argentina in a friendly against Iceland.

images.name: Lionel Messi doubles Argentina's lead from the penalty spot
images.caption: Lionel Messi doubles Argentina's lead from the penalty spot

articles.headline: Martínez: Cristiano Ronaldo sets the example for Portugal

article.headline: Serbia warm up for England Euros opener by crushing Sweden
article.description: Goals from Sergej Milinkovic-Savic, Aleksandar Mitrovic and Dusan Tadic gave Serbia the perfect send-off as they cruised to a comfortable 3-0 over Sweden in their final friendly ahead of Euro 2024 in Germany, which begins next Friday.
article.linkText: Serbia warm up for England with win in Sweden

images.name: Serbia celeb vs. Sweden_20240608 [1296x729]
images.alt: Dusan Tadic of Serbia celebrates scoring his team's third goal with teammates during the international friendly match between Sweden and Serbia at Friends Arena on June 08, 2024 in Stockholm, Sweden

peers.name: Serbia celeb vs. Sweden_20240608 [1296x518]
peers.alt: Dusan Tadic of Serbia celebrates scoring his team's third goal with teammates during the international friendly match between Sweden and Serbia at Friends Arena on June 08, 2024 in Stockholm, Sweden

article.story:
Goals from Sergej Milinkovic-Savic, Aleksandar Mitrovic and Dusan Tadic gave Serbia the perfect send-off as they cruised to a comfortable 3-0 over Sweden in their final friendly ahead of Euro 2024 in Germany, which begins next Friday.

With Sweden's record goal-scorer Zlatan Ibrahimovic among the 46,956 watching from the stands ahead of a post-match ceremony in his honour, Milinkovic-Savic broke the deadlock with an 18th-minute header as the Swedish defence was caught napping.

The Swedes brought on Alexander Isak at half-time and created a number of good chances but Mitrovic added the second goal with his final touch of the game on the hour mark, before being replaced by Tadic, and the substitute scored himself eight minutes later to complete the rout.

Serbia kick off their Euro 2024 Group C campaign against England in Gelsenkirchen on June 16 before going on to meet Slovenia and Denmark.

keyEvents.text: Goal!  Sweden 0, Serbia 1. Sergej Milinkovic-Savic (Serbia) header from the left side of the six yard box to the top left corner. Assisted by Andrija Zivkovic with a cross.
Sasa Lukic (Serbia) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Nikola Milenkovic (Serbia) is shown the yellow card.
Strahinja Pavlovic (Serbia) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Substitution, Serbia. Nemanja Gudelj replaces Sasa Lukic.
Substitution, Sweden. Alexander Isak replaces Gustaf Nilsson.
Substitution, Sweden. Hugo Larsson replaces Niclas Eliasson.
Isak Hien (Sweden) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal!  Sweden 0, Serbia 2. Aleksandar Mitrovic (Serbia) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Filip Mladenovic with a cross.
Substitution, Serbia. Dusan Tadic replaces Aleksandar Mitrovic.
Substitution, Serbia. Filip Kostic replaces Filip Mladenovic.
Substitution, Sweden. Emil Holm replaces Emil Forsberg.
Substitution, Sweden. Williot Swedberg replaces Anthony Elanga.
Goal!  Sweden 0, Serbia 3. Dusan Tadic (Serbia) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the top right corner. Assisted by Filip Kostic   following a fast break.
Substitution, Serbia. Luka Jovic replaces Andrija Zivkovic.
Substitution, Serbia. Veljko Birmancevic replaces Sergej Milinkovic-Savic.
Substitution, Sweden. Carl Starfelt replaces Victor Lindelöf.
Substitution, Serbia. Lazar Samardzic replaces Dusan Vlahovic.
